title: PR-2 autonomous decision state and indexed work selection
summary: Implement explicit serializable resident autonomy state, structured reasons, schedule/need/capability arbitration and bounded indexed Top-K offer/path/reservation selection in sim-core without product projection changes.
acceptance: A ResidentAutonomyStore or equivalent typed-lane owner records exactly idle, claiming, moving, working, blocked, completed, failed and interrupted with current offer/job/target references, state-entered tick, retry tick, version basis and structured reason; snapshot round-trip preserves execution state without Promise, coroutine, generator, closure cursor or object-reference identity

Deterministic arbitration applies hard safety/health, active non-interruptible work, schedule window, need urgency, capability/permission and indexed ordinary work in the reviewed order; emergency needs request interruption through the existing driver policy and no player work-priority or direct-job command is introduced

Work discovery reads exact WorkOffer or owner-index buckets with candidateCap 24, retained/scored cap 12, exact path cap 4, at most two new resident decisions per tick and stable score/offer-id/target-id tie breaks; tests mechanically reject global entity/cell scans and report cap metrics

Claiming revalidates need/schedule/capability/offer/path owner versions before one atomic ReservationLedger transaction; failed acquisition leaves no partial claim and stale path/owner basis cannot mutate jobs, routes, positions, items or targets

Structured reasons cover idle, need, capability, offer, path, reservation, blocked, failed and interrupted families with code, source, subject/target, no more than six ordered scalar parameters and a read-only inspection suggestion; generic prose-only failure is rejected

Hot decision paths use reusable typed scratch lanes and make no per-resident per-tick object, array, closure or string allocation; metrics expose visited/scored/selected candidates, exact paths, node expansions, stale rejects, reservation conflicts and decision deferrals

The task is protocol-neutral and product-neutral: it does not modify GameSession integration, Worker/Web/Pixi/HUD, schema/projection, save/load, runtime dependencies, PR-3 commands or release surfaces
requiredChecks: corepack pnpm exec vitest run packages/sim-core/src/game-session-autonomy.test.ts packages/sim-core/src/work-offers.test.ts packages/sim-core/src/pathing.test.ts packages/sim-core/src/reservation-ledger.test.ts packages/sim-core/src/m3-needs.test.ts

history.details: Bounded protocol-neutral autonomy state/reason/indexed-selection tranche after WM-0169; remains proposed and unclaimed.

Public owner APIs cannot satisfy the reviewed owner-version and zero-allocation contract within allowedPaths: WorkOfferIndex has no row/index owner version and materializes read/selection objects; GridPathfinder allocates result paths; ReservationLedger.acquire allocates prepared/claim-id arrays; M3AbilityCacheStore.queryAbility materializes results. A reviewed prerequisite must add version-bound, caller-owned output/scratch surfaces or revise the acceptance contract. Evidence: coordination/reports/WM-0170-plan.md and coordination/reports/WM-0170.md.

Created ready/unclaimed WM-0177 as the sole additive generic owner-surface repair. WM-0170 now depends on WM-0177 and remains blocked/claimed by its original simulation-engineer until the exact resume procedure is satisfied; no acceptance threshold or implementation scope is lowered.
WM-0177 owner-version and caller-owned output prerequisite is verified, integrated and done; resume the unchanged WM-0170 contract.

Independent B1 review proved the WM-0177 audit covered ordinary WorkOffer/path/reservation/ability owners but not allocation-free food/rest/medical exact indexes. Selected strict prerequisite WM-0181 and rejected derived WorkOffer mirroring.

Independent B1 review proved that WM-0177 repaired ordinary WorkOffer/path/reservation/ability owners but not the architecture-required food/rest/medical exact indexes: their selection/read APIs still materialize results and cannot provide same-call owner/row/index/backlog/caregiver-basis revalidation. Systems-architect selected strict prerequisite WM-0181 and rejected derived WorkOffer mirroring. Preserve the Phase A/B1 non-complete checkpoint; do not resume coordinator implementation until WM-0181 is verified, integrated and done and the exact resume procedure passes.

saveLoadStance: Internal typed snapshot/restore evidence is required for explicit execution state, but no GameSession save format, load path or compatibility promise is created.
forbiddenPaths: packages/sim-core/src/game-session-runtime.ts, game-session-tick.ts, game-session-initializer.ts or other default GameSession integration files owned by WM-0171
modifying generic WorkOffer, pathing, ReservationLedger, needs, schedule, ability or historical driver owner stores instead of composing their public surfaces
packages/sim-protocol/**, packages/sim-worker/**, apps/**, packages/renderer-pixi/** or packages/ui-react/**
global pawn/world/map scans, unbounded candidate/path work, Promise/coroutine/closure execution state, UI or real-clock authority
save format/load implementation, new runtime dependency, PR-3 command/building/priority scope or release action
executionLane: simulation-engineer; Spark is prohibited because the task defines deterministic AI state, path/reservation ownership and hot-loop behavior
resumeProcedure: WM-0181 must be independently reviewed as verified, integrated and marked done after its WM-0177 dependency.

The original simulation-engineer must run: node .agents/skills/wuming-town-agent-workflow/scripts/taskctl.mjs unblock --id WM-0170 --agent simulation-engineer --summary "WM-0181 food/rest/medical caller-owned exact-index prerequisite is verified, integrated and done; resume the unchanged WM-0170 contract."

After unblock, rerun the complete public owner API audit from coordination/reports/WM-0170-plan.md against ordinary WorkOffer/path/reservation/ability surfaces and the integrated food/rest/medical Into surfaces, including owner/row/index/backlog and caregiver ability bases.

Revise the dirty B1 selection contract to persist numeric candidateSourceCode, pendingJobId and a generic source-local candidate basis; provide explicit caller-owned claim-plan header/transaction/claim-slot scratch and coordinator-owned five-lane arbitration.

Only if that audit and the repaired B1 review pass may WM-0170 resume coordinator implementation under the original acceptance without lowering allocation, owner-version, cap, atomicity, path, determinism or scope thresholds.
singleWriterRule: WM-0181 is the sole ready repair writer. WM-0170 remains blocked with its original simulation-engineer owner and Phase A/B1 checkpoint until WM-0181 is verified/integrated/done and the exact resume procedure passes; WM-0171..WM-0175 retain their existing dependencies.

blocker.reason: Independent B1 review proved that WM-0177 repaired ordinary WorkOffer/path/reservation/ability owners but not the architecture-required food/rest/medical exact indexes: their selection/read APIs still materialize results and cannot provide same-call owner/row/index/backlog/caregiver-basis revalidation. Systems-architect selected strict prerequisite WM-0181 and rejected derived WorkOffer mirroring. Preserve the Phase A/B1 non-complete checkpoint; do not resume coordinator implementation until WM-0181 is verified, integrated and done and the exact resume procedure passes.
